description: Advanced web scraping with anti-bot detection evasion

evals.prompt: Extract the title and all product prices from https://example.com using the web-reader skill. Extract the main heading as 'title' and any price elements as 'prices'.
evals.expected_output: JSON output with url, title, fields containing extracted data, and metadata showing stealth was used

evals.prompt: Use the web-reader skill to scrape a news article from a news website. Extract the headline, publication date, and article body. Enable stealth mode to avoid bot detection.
evals.expected_output: Extracted headline, date, and body text in structured JSON format

evals.prompt: Write a Python script using the web-reader skill that extracts all job listings from a job board website, including job title, company name, salary range, and job description. Use CSS selectors to extract each field.
evals.expected_output: Working Python script with WebReader class that extracts structured job data

evals.prompt: Use web-reader skill to scrape this xiaohongshu (小红书) post: https://www.xiaohongshu.com/discovery/item/69bfa6c0000000001a02b5fa. Try to extract the title, author, and content. The site has strong anti-bot protection so use stealth mode and mobile User-Agent.
evals.expected_output: JSON with extracted data OR clear error showing if blocked (captcha_detected flag)

evals.prompt: Create a web scraping script for a difficult Chinese website that has CAPTCHA protection. The script should: 1) Use stealth mode, 2) Implement retry logic with exponential backoff, 3) Detect block pages by checking for '请在客户端查看' text, 4) Use mobile User-Agent and zh-CN locale.
evals.expected_output: Python script with all required features
